name: Crockpot Pina Colada Bread Pudding
recipeIngredient: 10 oz Frozen pina colada drink mix
recipeInstructions:
1. Peel crust from bread using a sharp knife; discard or make into breadcrumbs for another recipe.
2. Cut bread into 1-inch cubes and set aside.
3. In blender or food processor fitted with metal blade, combine half of the liquid ingredients: pina colada drink mix, pineapple juice, evaporated milk, cream of coconut, and banana slices. Puree until smooth; pour into a 6-cup bowl.
4. Puree remaining liquid ingredients along with eggs and rum (if desired). Combine both purees and set aside.
5. In a separate bowl, combine raisins and crushed pineapple with juice. Set aside.
6. Place about two-thirds of bread cubes in slow cooker and sprinkle with half teaspoon lemon peel.
7. Spread one cup of the raisin-crushed pineapple mixture over the bread.
8. Top with remaining bread cubes, then remaining half teaspoon lemon peel and raisin-crushed pineapple mixture.
9. Pour pureed ingredients into slow cooker.
10. Cover and cook on low for 6 hours.
11. Spoon pudding into 8 or 10 dessert dishes and serve hot. Garnish with fresh mint sprigs.
This recipe is inspired by Mable Hoffman's "All-New Crockery Favorites" cookbook.
